route: decode-only SPEC_DECODE research route; default off

tokens.semantics: tokens[0] is the previous accepted token; tokens[1:T] are K draft proposals

base_pos.semantics: position of tokens[0], equal to accepted_context_length - 1
base_pos.reason: target prediction at output index i verifies draft token i for i<K

inputs.target_kv: existing target KV prefix through base_pos; route must not corrupt committed prefix
inputs.draft_kv: draft KV prefix through accepted context; full-accept cache-hole case must be handled

outputs.emitted_tokens: draft prefix plus target correction/bonus token at accept_prefix_len
outputs.commit_metadata: target/draft KV commit range and rollback/ignore range

kv_protocol.minimum_safe_design: temporary target KV overlay for proposed block, then commit accepted prefix
kv_protocol.allowed_optimization: idempotent rewrite of previous accepted token at base_pos if value-identical
kv_protocol.fallback: if temp/rollback unavailable, fall back to target-only decode

speed_gate: target verify <=1.3-1.5x one T==1 pass before end-to-end SPEC_DECODE route
